draft_text: 5 Action Steps to Help Someone Having Thoughts of Suicide Download PDF En español We can all take steps to help prevent suicide.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Knowing the warning signs for suicide and how to get help can save lives.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: 5 Action Steps Here are 5 steps you can take to #BeThe1To help someone who is having thoughts of suicide:
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: ASK: “Are you thinking about suicide?” It’s not an easy question to ask, but it can help start a conversation.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Studies show that asking people if they are suicidal does not increase suicidal behavior or thoughts.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: HELP KEEP THEM SAFE: Reducing access to highly lethal items or places can help prevent suicide.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Asking the person if they have a plan and making lethal means less available or less deadly can help the person stay safe when suicidal thoughts arise.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: HELP THEM CONNECT: Connecting the person with the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (call or text 988) and other community resources can give them a safety net when they need it.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You can also help them reach out to a trusted family member, friend, spiritual advisor, or mental health professional.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Studies show that supportive, ongoing contact can play an important role in suicide prevention.
rationale: Extracted from remote_5-action-steps-to-help-someone-having-thoughts-o_369a51eea49b.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Effective, evidence-based programs and treatment options can help prevent suicide.
rationale: Extracted from remote_suicide-prevention_e036d09a0239.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH is supporting and conducting research to understand who is at risk of suicide and why.
rationale: Extracted from remote_suicide-prevention_e036d09a0239.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: We’re also supporting research that evaluates the effectiveness of different suicide prevention programs.
rationale: Extracted from remote_suicide-prevention_e036d09a0239.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: And we’re supporting research to develop and test fast-acting treatments that can reduce suicidal thoughts and behaviors.
rationale: Extracted from remote_suicide-prevention_e036d09a0239.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Learn how to find help for yourself or someone else.
